name: OpenWatchParty (Develop)
description: Watch movies together in sync with friends on Jellyfin
overview: Rolling development build of OpenWatchParty, rebuilt automatically from the develop branch. Unstable — for testers only.

versions.changelog:
fix(ci): resolve rustfmt violation and missing test runtime assemblies

tasks.rs had a warn! call exceeding rustfmt's line width. The test
project also inherited ExcludeAssets=runtime from the plugin's
Jellyfin package references, which is correct for the plugin (host
provides those DLLs) but left the test project unable to load
MediaBrowser.Common/Model at run time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
